MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DEMURRER (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHOTSKI, LLC DBA SILVER SPUR'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT FOR SLANDER PER SE IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS THAT HE WAS FALSELY ACCUSED OF VIOLATING PENAL CODE 311.2. (SEE CIV. CODE 46.) PENAL CODE 311.2 CAN BE VIOLATED WHETHER OR NOT THE PERPETRATOR PROFITS FROM THE ENTERPRISE. IN ADDITION, A VIOLATION CAN BE BASED ON A SINGLE OBSCENE MATTER. LASTLY, DEFENDANT'S ASSERTION THAT THE CRIME MUST BE "INDICTABLE OR PUNISHABLE BY DEATH OR IMPRISONMENT" IS NOT SUPPORTED BY THE CITATIONS THAT WITKIN ADDUCES. IN ANY EVENT, PENAL CODE 311.2 IS A CRIME PUNISHABLE BY IMPRISONMENT. (SEE PENAL CODE 311.9.) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100057430) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHOTSKI, LLC D/B/A SILVER SPUR
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-03-2019 VACATED. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON 3/22/19. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant Shotski, LLC dba Silver Spur's demurrer to the complaint for slander per se is OVERRULED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts that he was falsely accused of violating Penal Code 311.2. (See Civ. Code 46.) Penal Code 311.2 can be violated whether or not the perpetrator profits from the enterprise. In addition, a violation can be based on a single obscene matter. Lastly, defendant's assertion that the crime must be "indictable or punishable by death or imprisonment" is not supported by the citations that Witkin adduces. In any event, Penal Code 311.2 is a crime punishable by imprisonment. (See Penal Code 311.9.) Order is signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
